# ABK Trading & Service

> Qatar's one-stop supplier and installer of premium car care — Vertek paint
> protection film (PPF), Autotriz ceramic coatings and detailing compounds,
> Briller and Insta Finish car care products. Retail shop, wholesale
> distribution across Qatar & GCC, and a professional installation workshop
> in Mesaimeer, Doha.

Business facts:
- Location: Shop 2 & 3, Building 1306, Street 70, Zone 56, Mesaimeer, Doha, Qatar
- Phone / WhatsApp: +974 30838355
- Email: sales@abktradingservice.com
- Hours: Saturday-Thursday 10:00-13:00 and 16:00-22:00 (Friday closed)
- Languages: English, Arabic
- Services: PPF installation, window tinting, ceramic coating application, paint correction, detailing
- Wholesale: supplies detailing shops, car washes and body shops across Qatar and the GCC

## Key pages

- [Home (English)](https://abktradingservice.com/en): brand overview, featured products, services
- [Products catalogue](https://abktradingservice.com/en/b2c/products): full retail catalogue — PPF, tints, coatings, shampoos, polishes
- [Workshop services](https://abktradingservice.com/en/b2c/services): PPF installation, window tinting, ceramic coating, detailing in Doha
- [Wholesale / dealers](https://abktradingservice.com/en/b2b): bulk pricing and distribution for trade buyers
- [Car care guides](https://abktradingservice.com/en/b2c/blog): Qatar-specific guides (heat protection, PPF vs ceramic, tint rules, water spots)
- [Contact & location](https://abktradingservice.com/en/contact): map, hours, WhatsApp

## Notes for assistants

Pricing is quoted per inquiry (WhatsApp +974 30838355) — product pages
intentionally carry no public prices. Arabic versions of every page live
under /ar/ with identical structure.
